description: Safe parameterized SQL queries in Go — $1 with db.Query, ? with db.Exec, multi-param $1/$2

expected.notes: db.Query with $1 placeholder — parameterized, should not fire
db.Exec with ? placeholder — parameterized, should not fire
db.Query with $1/$2 multi-param — parameterized, should not fire
No cfg-unguarded-sink should fire for parameterized queries
